Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 318}You have some nerve dozing off in class this early in the new semester...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 318}Why, back in my day, it was unheard of! Hmph, kids these days...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 319}Yeah, yeah, I'm sorry, all right? Yeesh, the semester's just started, and I'm already being nagged at.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 319}Man, just when I was planning on going to Hagakure for some ramen...[n]{f 1 1}
